full_text:
Sima Kui (Jida) 司馬馗 (季達)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Kui (司馬馗), styledJida (季達). 4th Son of Sima Fang, he would be a Chancellor of Lu and later awarded a marquisate. Sima Kui was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
